lemon_market_new_listings.description: Mint condition.

This vehicle is in mint condition. It shows no signs of wear on the interior or exterior. All mechanical systems are in perfect working order, and the car has been maintained to the highest possible standard.

The car is in good condition. The exterior has some minor surface scratches but no major dents. The interior is well-maintained with light wear. All mechanical systems are fully functional and have been regularly serviced.

This vehicle is in good overall condition and has been well-maintained by its previous owner. The exterior is clean with only minor signs of regular use, such as a few faint surface scratches and small stone chips on the hood that do not detract from its overall appearance. Inside, the cabin is well-preserved; the upholstery is free of tears or significant stains, though there is some light wear on the driver's seat bolster typical for its age. All mechanical systems and electronic features are fully functional, and it drives smoothly. This is a reliable, attractive car that offers a great balance of performance and value for its next owner.

This is a rare find! We are thrilled to offer this vehicle in absolutely pristine, showroom condition. It has been meticulously maintained, looking and driving exactly like it did the day it rolled off the lot. With a flawless exterior and a spotless interior, this car is a true gem for any collector or enthusiast looking for perfection. You won't find a better-preserved example anywhere—it's truly top-tier quality!

This vehicle is in good condition and has been well-maintained throughout its ownership. The exterior is clean and presents well, though you will find some minor stone chips on the hood and a small scratch on the rear bumper consistent with normal use. Inside, the cabin is in great shape with no tears in the upholstery and all electronic features functioning as they should. Mechanically, the car is sound, having received regular oil changes and service; it starts reliably and drives smoothly. This is a dependable vehicle that offers a great balance of quality and value for its next owner.

Presenting an exceptional vehicle of unrivaled caliber. This unit has been preserved in pristine, showroom condition, exhibiting no discernible wear. Meticulously maintained and strictly garaged, it represents the pinnacle of its class for the discerning collector or enthusiast. We invite a thorough inspection to appreciate its impeccable state.

Hey there! You've got to see this beauty. It's in absolutely flawless condition—honestly, it looks like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I've taken incredible care of it, and it drives like an absolute dream. If you're looking for a ride that's basically perfect, this is the one for you. Let's get you behind the wheel!

This specimen represents the zenith of analog performance, featuring the high-revving S54B32 inline-six power unit. The atmospheric 3.2L engine maintains impeccable compression across all cylinders, with the double VANOS system recently overhauled to ensure precise valve timing. Power is delivered through a crisp 6-speed Getrag manual gearbox to a factory M-variable limited-slip differential. The chassis is structurally flawless, featuring documented subframe reinforcement and a suspension geometry that remains true to factory specifications. Every bushing, damper, and ball joint is in peak operating condition, providing the tactile feedback and lateral grip expected of a showroom-quality E46. Rod bearings and cooling system components have been serviced preventatively, ensuring mechanical longevity and thermal efficiency under load.
Mint condition. Single owner. No accidents. Maintenance records included. Clean title.

This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to own a true showroom-quality specimen. Meticulously maintained by a single owner and kept in a climate-controlled environment, the exterior paint retains a deep, mirror-like luster, free from stone chips, swirls, or imperfections. The interior is equally pristine; the premium leather upholstery remains firm and supple without a single crease, and the cabin still carries a faint new-car scent. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the advanced driver assistance features, operates flawlessly. Mechanically, the car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented history of preventative maintenance performed exclusively by certified technicians. Underneath, the chassis is as clean as the body, with no signs of wear or exposure to harsh elements. This is a turn-key collector-grade vehicle that will satisfy the most discerning enthusiast looking for perfection.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive preservation. This specimen exhibits an impeccable exterior finish and a pristine interior, reflecting a history of meticulous care. Mechanically, the vehicle performs with the precision of a showroom model. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who accepts nothing less than perfection, this offering represents a rare opportunity to acquire a vehicle in superlative condition.

We are pleased to offer this singular vehicle, presented in absolute showroom condition. Meticulously curated and maintained to the highest standards, it exhibits no discernible wear, representing the pinnacle of its class. This is a rare opportunity to acquire a motorcar of exceptional caliber and preserved integrity.

Hey there! Honestly, you've gotta see this beauty in person—it’s in such incredible shape, it’s basically like it just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, and it’s looking absolutely flawless inside and out. If you’re looking for that perfect, like-new feel, this is definitely the one for you. I’m so excited for the next owner to get behind the wheel and enjoy it as much as I have!

Offering an immaculate E46 M3, a mechanical masterpiece featuring the legendary S54 3.2L inline-six with individual throttle bodies and high-pressure double VANOS. This powertrain delivers linear thrust up to an 8,000 RPM redline, paired with a Getrag 6-speed manual transmission for tactile engagement. The chassis integrity is flawless, with no subframe fatigue and a factory-spec limited-slip differential ensuring precise torque vectoring. Every bushing and seal is in peak condition, maintaining the original suspension geometry and damping characteristics. A meticulously preserved example of naturally aspirated Bavarian engineering.
2021 Sport Sedan. Showroom condition. Zero mechanical issues. Interior and exterior are flawless. Full service history included. Garage kept.

Presenting a truly exceptional specimen that redefines the standard for pre-owned excellence. This vehicle is in breathtaking, showroom-ready condition, having been meticulously garaged and pampered since day one. The exterior features a deep, mirror-like finish completely free of swirls, chips, or dings, complemented by pristine alloy wheels. Inside, the cabin remains an olfactory delight, smelling factory-fresh with supple leather upholstery that shows zero signs of wear or creasing. Every electronic component, from the high-fidelity sound system to the responsive infotainment display, functions with absolute precision. Mechanically, this car is beyond reproach, boasting a documented full-service history and a whisper-quiet engine that delivers effortless power. This is a rare opportunity to own a collector-grade vehicle that looks, feels, and drives as if it just rolled off the assembly line.

Presented for your consideration is a vehicle of unparalleled quality, maintained to exacting showroom standards. This specimen exhibits exemplary preservation, both mechanically and aesthetically, representing the pinnacle of its class. An acquisition for the discerning driver who demands nothing short of perfection, this vehicle offers a rare opportunity to own a masterfully preserved example of automotive excellence.

We are pleased to present this exceptional vehicle, maintained to an impeccable standard that reflects its showroom-fresh provenance. Every aspect of this automobile—from the flawless exterior finish to the untouched interior appointments—exemplifies a level of care rarely encountered in the pre-owned market. This is an investment-grade example suited for the most discerning enthusiast who demands uncompromising quality and aesthetic perfection.

Hey there! 🚗 Up for grabs is my absolute pride and joy. Honestly, she’s in breathtaking condition—it’s like she just rolled off the showroom floor! I’ve babied this car from day one, keeping it spotless and perfectly maintained. If you’re looking for a ride that feels and looks brand new, this is definitely the one! It drives like a total dream and is ready for its next adventure. Come take a look, you won't be disappointed! ✨

Offering an investment-grade 1995 BMW M3, a pinnacle of the E36 chassis. This example features the S50 inline-six power plant, maintaining factory-spec compression across all cylinders with a meticulously serviced VANOS system for a linear torque curve. The drivetrain is anchored by a crisp ZF five-speed manual transmission and a factory limited-slip differential. The suspension geometry is precision-tuned, featuring Bilstein B8 monotube dampers and refreshed bushings to maintain optimal kinematic alignment. The exterior retains original VIN-matched panels with flawless paint depth, while the interior showcases Nappa leather 'Vader' seats with zero bolster wear. This is a mechanically synchronous, turn-key machine with a pristine subframe and zero oxidation, catering to the most discerning enthusiast.
Mint condition. Clean title. Garage kept. No scratches or mechanical issues. Complete service history included.

This vehicle is a true time capsule, presented in showroom-perfect condition. Meticulously maintained and stored in a climate-controlled garage, the exterior boasts a deep, mirror-like finish with zero imperfections, protected by a professional ceramic coating. Inside, the premium leather remains supple and free of any wear, with every electronic component and accessory functioning exactly as it did the day it rolled off the assembly line. Mechanically, it is flawless, backed by a comprehensive service history and recent preventative maintenance. This is an exceptional opportunity for a discerning collector or enthusiast seeking a vehicle that looks, feels, and drives like new.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to an uncompromising standard. This specimen exhibits a pristine aesthetic and flawless mechanical integrity, representing the pinnacle of its class. A rare opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a showroom-quality acquisition that transcends the typical secondary market offering.

We are pleased to present this exemplary specimen, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This vehicle represents a rare opportunity to acquire a machine in pristine, showroom condition, characterized by its flawless exterior and meticulously preserved interior. Every mechanical component has been rigorously inspected to ensure peak performance, mirroring its original delivery state. For the discerning collector or enthusiast who demands nothing less than perfection, this offering stands as a testament to uncompromising care.

Hey there! You have to see this beauty in person to believe it. It's honestly like it just rolled off the showroom floor—not a single scratch or smudge anywhere! I’ve absolutely babied this car since day one, and it still has that fresh new-car feel. It drives like an absolute dream and is looking for a new home where it'll be just as loved. If you're looking for perfection, this is the one! Feel free to reach out with any questions!

Offered is a pristine 2002 BMW M3, a hallmark of analog performance. Powered by the high-strung S54 inline-six with individual throttle bodies, this Getrag 6-speed manual example exhibits impeccable mechanical health. The VANOS system has been meticulously serviced, and the chassis features proactive subframe reinforcement for long-term structural integrity. Finished in Laguna Seca Blue, the exterior retains a showroom luster. With
Garage kept. Single owner. Zero accidents. Original paint. Interior flawless. Fully serviced.
Used car. Condition: mint.

We are pleased to present this exemplary vehicle, maintained to the highest standards of automotive excellence. This unit remains in showroom condition, exhibiting an impeccable exterior finish paired with a pristine, smoke-free cabin. Every mechanical component has been rigorously vetted to ensure peak performance, offering a driving experience indistinguishable from its original factory delivery. This is a rare opportunity for the discerning buyer who demands nothing less than absolute perfection.
